reasoning: The Polymarket prediction market estimated this at 3% on October 16, 2025, suggesting deep skepticism that RFK Jr. would meet his goals by the deadline. While he reiterated in August 2025 that he would have answers by September, no broad announcement identifying a definitive cause was reported in September or October, and he reportedly fired the federal scientists initially tasked with investigating environmental causes. With the knowledge cutoff on October 26, only five days remain until the October 31 deadline. Given the lack of recent news indicating an imminent breakthrough and the widespread scientific consensus that contradicts the premise of a single environmental cause, the probability of an announcement meeting the strict criteria in the remaining 5 days is vanishingly small. I am adjusting down to 2%, the lowest allowed edge.
